about: Global cloud-free Blue Marble day surface and VIIRS Black Marble night lights from NASA GIBS, plus a derived land mask for hybrid ocean transparency.

sources.name: Blue Marble Next Generation
sources.citation: NASA Global Imagery Browse Services (GIBS), BlueMarble_NextGeneration composite

sources.name: VIIRS Black Marble
sources.org: NASA GIBS / NOAA VIIRS Day/Night Band
sources.citation: NASA GIBS VIIRS_Black_Marble night lights composite

sources.name: Derived land/ocean mask
sources.citation: Land mask derived from day texture chroma (land=opaque, ocean=translucent in hybrid globe mode)
